titleStmt.title: SII 36.303: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 303. (A.R. No. 303 of 1910.) NAGAR, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nāgaveṉṉa-Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Under the orders of the king, conveyed through a tirumugam, the local chief (Nagara-kiḻāṉ) Ulagaḷandachōḻa Mūvēndavēḷāṉ granted lands and taxes as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam for sacred food and other services in the temple of Nāḍuḍaiya Perumāḷ in Nagar alias Dhīnachintāmaṇinallūr in Oymā-nāḍu alias Vijayarājēndra-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that a total of 600 kuḻis of land in the village which was assigned on an earlier occasion to a dēvadāṉa were excluded from the present grant. The taxes exempted in favour of the temple include kaḍamai, kuḍimai, kācāyam, taṟiyiṟai, taṭṭār-pāṭṭam, cekkuk-kaḍamai and ērimīṉ-pāṭṭam. The official order was attested by two officers, Kappalūr Uḍaiyāṉ and Vāṇādarāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vāḷāl vaḻitiṟanta perumāḷ parākramapāṇḍa devarkku nālāvatu nāyaṉār nāṭuṭaiyap perumāḷukkut tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭavai kīḻpākkappiṟivu nāṭuṭaip perumāḷ nallūrkku Eḻutiṉa tirumuka
ppaṭi tribhuvaṉa cakravatti koṉerimel koṇṭāṉ Oymāṉāṭāṉa vijayarājentra vaḷanāṭṭu nakar Āṉa dīnacintāmaṇi nallūril nāyaṉār nāṭuṭaiya perumāḷ koyiṟ tāṉattārkku nakarakiḻāṉ nāṭuṭaip perumāṉ
Ulakaḷantacoḻa mūventaveḷāṉ kāṇiyuṭaiyaṉavai kīḻpākkattu Ivvūrp piṟivu nāṭuṭaip perumāḷ nallūr kalnāṭṭukku Uṭpaṭṭa kīḻai nattamum kīḻai Ēriyum kīḻaik kaḻaṉiyum puṉcey puṟavaṭaiyum Uḷḷūr nāyaṉār tirunā
giśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār paḻantevatāṉamāṉa Erikīḻ kalnāṭṭi niṟkum paṉṉīraṭik kolāl kuḻi 5 100 m piḷḷaiyār nāṭuṭai vināyakap piḷḷaiyārkku tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa paṉṉīraṭiyāṟ kuḻi 100 m Āka kuḻi 6 100 Ikkuḻi
Aṟunūṟum nīkki nilaṅkaḷāl Uḷḷa kaṭamai kuṭimai kācāyam taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam cekkuk kaṭamai Ērimīṉ pāṭṭam maṟṟum Uḷḷa Upādhikaḷum Uṭpaṭa nālāvatu mutal tiruvārādhaṉattukkum tiruppaṇikkum mutal
tirunāmattukkāṇi
Aṭaṅkal Iṟaiili Āka tiru
viṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭu
Ippaṭikku variilār kaṇa
kkilum kaḻikkac coṉ
ṉom Ippaṭi candrāditya
varai celvatākak kal
lilum cempilum veṭṭi
kkoḷka tulyam Ivai
kappalūr Uṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai vāṇātarā
yaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu nālā
vatu nāḷ 100 5 10 1 śubhamastu
Digital edition of SII 36.303 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
